message:
Running command: MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
WRAPPER_RUN="$MCU_DIR/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
DRT_ODB="$WRAPPER_RUN/67-openroad-repairantennas/1-openroad-diodeinsertion/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.odb"
FIXED_ODB="$WRAPPER_RUN/67-openroad-repairantennas/1-openroad-diodeinsertion/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper_fixed.odb"

echo "=== Writing OpenROAD script to fix VDDIO/VSSIO bterm pins ==="
cat > /tmp/fix_vddio_bterm.tcl << EOF
# Fix multiple bpins on VDDIO and VSSIO bterms
read_db "$DRT_ODB"
set block [ord::get_db_block]

foreach net_name {VDDIO VSSIO} {
    set net \[\$block findNet \$net_name\]
    if { \$net == "NULL" } {
        puts "Net \$net_name: not found, skipping"
        continue
    }
    set bterms \[\$net getBTerms\]
    puts "Net \$net_name: [llength \$bterms] bterms"
    foreach bterm \$bterms {
        set bpins \[\$bterm getBPins\]
        puts "  bterm [\$bterm getName]: [llength \$bpins] bpins -> removing all but first"
        set first 1
        foreach bpin \$bpins {
            if { \$first } {
                set first 0
                continue
            }
            # Remove extra bpins (keep only first)
            odb::dbBPin_destroy \$bpin
        }
        set bpins_after \[\$bterm getBPins\]
        puts "  bterm [\$bterm getName] after: [llength \$bpins_after] bpins"
    }
}

write_db "$FIXED_ODB"
puts "Written fixed ODB to $FIXED_ODB"
EOF

# Run the fix
echo "Running OpenROAD to fix VDDIO/VSSIO bterm pins..."
openroad -no_init -exit /tmp/fix_vddio_bterm.tcl 2>&1 | grep -v "^OpenROAD\|^Copyright\|^This\|^Component\|^Features\|^License" | grep -v "^$" | head -20
